promotionDelta: Run and record Basic and Recommended Storybook controls plus controlled, empty or disabled where relevant, narrow, RTL, forced-colors, reduced-motion, keyboard, touch, and screen-reader-oriented evidence.
Generate and verify package, editable source, native registry, Shadcn, docs, and subpath outputs.
Complete the current Risk Class 3 keyboard, screen-reader, speech, switch, touch, zoom, and forced-colors manual matrix.
Pass supported-browser, visual, accessibility, lifecycle, frozen-install, packed Next.js and Vite, and package/source parity gates.
Add Semantic Sync clean update, customized update, conflict, rollback, and removal fixtures.
Publish an approved Quality Passport and dogfood the generated output on the public site.
